heading: Community health centers and the National Health Service Corps Fund
label: 254b–2 Community health centers and the National Health Service Corps Fund
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act, and not as part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: a Purpose
children.text: It is the purpose of this section to establish a Community Health Center Fund (referred to in this section as the “CHC Fund”), to be administered through the Office of the Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services to provide for expanded and sustained national investment in community health centers under and the National Health Service Corps.section 254b of this title

children.label: E
children.text: $3,600,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2015 through 2017;

children.label: G
children.text: $4,000,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023;

children.label: K
children.text: $1,159,452,055 for the period beginning on , and ending on ; andOctober 1, 2026December 31, 2026

children.label: E
children.text: $310,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2015 through 2017;

children.label: F
children.text: $310,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2018 and 2019;

children.label: H
children.text: $310,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2023;

children.label: L
children.text: $88,219,178 for the period beginning on , and ending on .October 1, 2026December 31, 2026

children.heading: Construction
children.label: c Construction
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated, and there is appropriated, out of any monies in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $1,500,000,000 to be available for fiscal years 2011 through 2015 to be used by the Secretary of Health and Human Services for the construction and renovation of community health centers.

children.heading: Use of fund
children.label: d Use of fund
children.text: The Secretary of Health and Human Services shall transfer amounts in the CHC Fund to accounts within the Department of Health and Human Services to increase funding, over the fiscal year 2008 level, for community health centers and the National Health Service Corps.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: e Availability
children.text: Amounts appropriated under subsections (b) and (c) shall remain available until expended.
